final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account due to its negative association with credit risk in the dataset, because it is linked to a lower estimated probability of default, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk.[1]
The fact that employment duration is between four and seven years due to the absence of direct statistical evidence in the literature, because the provided excerpts do not contain risk classifications for this tenure, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[2]
The fact that the checking account balance is negative due to the positive correlation with default probability in the dataset, because it is statistically associated with an increased probability of default, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a high risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
대출 기간이 4~7년인 경우 일반적으로 위험 감소 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 보지 않고 위험 증가 요인으로 분류합니다 [2].
계좌 잔액 부족은 채무 불이행 확률 증가와 연관되어 있어 위험 증가 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 해석하지 않습니다 [3].
전반적으로 신용 위험이 높은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 낮습니다.
